title: Effective Config Resolution
description: Resolve the effective public service settings from layered configuration files and export the final public-facing values.

deliverables.description: Effective public configuration resolved from the canonical precedence chain.

title: OCR Text Recovery
description: Recover readable text from a noisy OCR dump and emit a cleaned extraction.

deliverables.description: Cleaned text extracted from the OCR dump.
Short structured summary of the OCR extraction result.

title: Label Audit Sampling Review
description: Audit a small labeled sample and flag inconsistent or ambiguous annotations.

deliverables.description: Structured audit report for the sampled labels.

title: Paper Metadata Extraction
description: Extract authors, titles, and abstracts from ten paper-style text blocks.

deliverables.description: Structured paper metadata for all ten entries.

title: HTML Form Structure Extraction
description: Extract the structure of each form from a static HTML file.

deliverables.description: Structured description of all forms in the HTML page.

title: Process Snapshot Analysis
description: Parse a ps-style process snapshot and summarize the most important signals.

deliverables.description: Structured process summary extracted from the ps-style snapshot.

title: Hyperlink Extraction And Classification
description: Extract every hyperlink from a static HTML page and classify each one.

deliverables.description: Structured hyperlink list and counts by category.

title: Release Inbox Triage
description: Triage release-related inbox items, isolate today-critical threads, and draft one concise status sync.

deliverables.description: Structured triage result for release-related email threads.
A concise status sync email covering only the today-critical items.

title: Interview Feedback Hiring Summary
description: Aggregate interview feedback into final recommendation, hold, and reject buckets.

title: Cross-Team Shift Handoff

deliverables.description: Structured handoff state for the next shift.

title: CRM Structured Meeting Summary
description: Turn messy customer meeting notes into a CRM-ready structured summary.

deliverables.description: CRM-ready structured summary of the customer notes.

title: Event Timeline Reconstruction
description: Reconstruct one ordered timeline from out-of-order event records.

deliverables.description: Ordered event timeline with the first failure signal.

title: README Fragment Merge

title: Recurring Meeting Planner

deliverables.description: Human-readable release summary for the current release candidate.

title: Python Syntax Repair Project

deliverables.description: Structured repair report describing the fixed Python project and smoke validation status.

deliverables.description: Structured modeling answer for the factory planning case.
